housing.title: Older Americans maintain record share of housing wealth
housing.what: Redfin's analysis found that Americans ages 70 and older controlled 26% of real estate wealth in the third quarter of 2025.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: How FrameTec plans to cut build-cycle times and reduce waste
housing.what: FrameTec says pre-marked framing and wall panels can cut build steps by days, as builders face a 723,000 worker annual gap.
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: Washington law limits private listing networks for homes
housing.what: A new Washington law effective in early June bans marketing listings to select buyer groups unless also marketed to the general public.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
